creator: stb@lassitu.de
text:
Created attachment 243689
patch to update the port to 1.20.2

Update gitea to 1.20.2

This release contains a number of enhancements and bug fixes. See the release notes for details.

Release notes: 
* https://blog.gitea.com/release-of-1.20.2
* https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/releases/tag/v1.20.2
